features: COMPATIBLE WITH EU SOCKETS: Ideal for use in a variety of destinations, this adapter is compatible with EU sockets found in countries such as Spain, France, Italy, Portugal, Greece, Germany, Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands, Denmark, Sweden, Finland, Norway, Poland, and Hungary. It also works in non-EU countries like Turkey, South Korea, and Russia, making it a comprehensive solution for international travel.
These adapters provided with internal shutters (to prevent your child from poking objects into the socket), try plugging upper pin first which will push the barrier down to clear bottom holes

SAFETY CERTIFICATION: Our adapter is fully compliant with ROHS standard, guaranteeing it meets rigorous safety and environmental regulations. This certification ensures that the adapter provides reliable performance and safety for your electronic devices, giving you peace of mind during your travels.
Suitable for mobile phones, tablets, laptops and small electrical appliances (not suitable for bigger appliances such as microwave, washing machines and kettles etc)
TEC UK authentic product, CE and UKCA approved
